scope: identical finished zirconia seat; one geometry
variable_cost_rule: accepted-part price plus scrap/yield and incoming CMM/optical inspection
quote_or_evidence_required: same drawing to at least two vendors; fired/post-ground process; yield; 1/3/10 delivered quotes
decision_use: primary cost discriminator for modular A

nre_allocation_rule: separate qualification lot setup shown explicitly
quote_or_evidence_required: vendor-recommended minimum coupon count and lot trace
decision_use: do not hide qualification pieces inside production unit price

variable_cost_rule: machining material cleaning CMM and yield
decision_use: compare cage labor against monolithic concept

nre_allocation_rule: forming/stress-relief fixture NRE divided by quantity
quote_or_evidence_required: supplier process and 20/250 C force coupon quote

scope: vented nut plates keepers and face fasteners
nre_allocation_rule: custom tooling NRE divided by quantity
variable_cost_rule: hardware set price cleaning inspection and replacement allowance
quote_or_evidence_required: exact alloy/finish/vent/galling/magnetic declarations and quantity breaks
decision_use: treat screw/nut/keeper as replaceable service kit

scope: protected cartridge guard/fanout tongue/comb excluding reusable LCC
nre_allocation_rule: fanout artwork/process NRE divided by quantity
quote_or_evidence_required: exact no-Ni metallization/join process and 1/3/10 quotes

scope: bonded Hall die plus LCC02046 reusable module
variable_cost_rule: die LCC adhesive wire bonding inspection and yield
quote_or_evidence_required: actual inventory/lot cost and qualified process traveler
decision_use: highest reuse-value item; never count as disposable head hardware

scope: two screened pairs per axis; six pair branches per head
nre_allocation_rule: termination tooling/setup NRE divided by branches
variable_cost_rule: delivered cable length plus screen clamp terminals cleaning and test
quote_or_evidence_required: exact cable/length/OD/bend/contact quote after physical route freeze

scope: 19C feedthrough and both mating connector systems
variable_cost_rule: feedthrough connectors contacts tools and inspection
quote_or_evidence_required: exact current part/configuration stock lead time price and written interface evidence
decision_use: purchase blocker; do not infer price from historical result

scope: three isolated ambient board domains and interface junction
variable_cost_rule: three isolation channels supplies enclosures protection and harnesses
quote_or_evidence_required: qualified isolator/current-source/DAQ BOM with live 2026 quotes
decision_use: Stage-40 correction; existing common-ground panel is not acceptable

nre_allocation_rule: test engineering/chamber/fixture NRE shown once per campaign
variable_cost_rule: chamber hours metrology destructive coupons operators and analysis
quote_or_evidence_required: facility rates and signed sample/duration plan
decision_use: report separately from hardware recurring cost

nre_allocation_rule: traveler/fixture training NRE divided by heads
variable_cost_rule: touch labor per head plus independent verification
quote_or_evidence_required: timed pilot build and rework/scrap history
decision_use: total cost = NRE/Q + accepted hardware + labor + inspection + yield loss

nre_allocation_rule: core tooling/programming NRE divided by quantity
variable_cost_rule: core accepted-part price plus high-value scrap risk
decision_use: reversal only if hard gates pass and total accepted cost beats corrected A

variable_cost_rule: extra parts assembly contact and service-cycle cost
decision_use: reversal only if service-value evidence offsets complexity
